_meta.note: The only hand-edited source for the Offensive Chemist. Every generated output (the two table XMLs, the two .en.nxd name tables, and the recolored icons) is derived from this file -- do not hand-edit the generated artifacts, they get clobbered.
_meta.what: Reworks 5 recycled cure consumables (item ids 246-250: Antidote / Eye Drops / Echo Herbs / Maiden's Kiss / Gold Needle -- all redundant once Remedy cures everything) into offensive status grenades the Chemist throws with the Item command.
_meta.formulaNote: Formula 56 (DECIMAL -- FFT references list formula/effect ids in hex; always hex->dec convert) = inflict-status-on-target. Z = success rate out of 100 (Z 100 = guaranteed).
_meta.statusIds: StatusEffectId is the ItemOptions status id (DECIMAL): 22=Poison, 9=Blind, 10=Silence, 101=Oil, 18=Slow.
_meta.ids: item id -> ItemConsumable row = id - 240; item id -> learn-menu ability Key = id + 128.

grenades.name: Venom Flask
grenades.itemDesc: Distilled toxin in a fragile vial. Inflicts Poison on the target.
grenades.abilityDesc: Hurl a Venom Flask to inflict Poison on the target.
grenades.iconNote: toxic yellow-green; keeps its own ei_246 shape

grenades.name: Smoke Bomb
grenades.itemDesc: A burst of acrid smoke. Inflicts Blind on the target.
grenades.abilityDesc: Hurl a Smoke Bomb to inflict Blind on the target.
grenades.iconNote: ashen grey; reuses the Spark Bomb (127) shape

grenades.name: Hush Vial
grenades.itemDesc: A throat-stilling draught in a fragile vial. Inflicts Silence on the target.
grenades.abilityDesc: Hurl a Hush Vial to inflict Silence on the target.
grenades.iconNote: pale silver-blue; reuses the Venom Flask (246) shape

grenades.name: Oil Flask
grenades.itemDesc: Clinging oil. Inflicts Oil on the target, doubling the Fire damage they take.
grenades.abilityDesc: Hurl an Oil Flask to coat the target in Oil, doubling Fire damage taken.
grenades.shopNote: setup item, pays off with Fire
grenades.iconNote: dark oily amber; reuses the Venom Flask (246) shape

grenades.name: Sludge Bomb
grenades.itemDesc: A splash of clinging mire. Inflicts Slow on the target.
grenades.abilityDesc: Hurl a Sludge Bomb to inflict Slow on the target.
grenades.iconNote: murky olive-brown; reuses the Spark Bomb (127) shape

remedy.note: Consequence of the rework: the 5 single-cures are now grenades, so Remedy (the cure-all) must be buyable from Chapter 1 or players lose early status-healing entirely. Drop this block if you keep the single-cures available some other way.
